post.description: Create User + default Organization + Owner membership (requires Clerk JWT).

Merge partial preferences; audit + cache invalidation.

post.description:
Accept a form submission for a **live** published page.

Matches the public URL shape ``/p/{org}/{page}`` — same org and page slugs as publish.
Supports ``application/json`` or ``application/x-www-form-urlencoded``.
Batch analytics beacon (up to 10 events) for a live published page.

Response Public Proposal Decline P  Org Slug   Page Slug  Proposal Decline Post

get.description:
Return **200** if ``domain`` is a verified custom hostname; **404** otherwise.

Caddy should call this over private networking. If ``CADDY_INTERNAL_TOKEN`` is set,
require header ``X-Forge-Caddy-Token`` to match.
